description: Implement UUID-based Entity Registry at generator level to deduplicate metadata and reduce graph.json size by ~60%
goal: Reduce scanner output file size and improve performance through entity deduplication
out_of_scope: Breaking changes to existing API contracts
Removal of existing output formats (must maintain backward compatibility)
constraints: No cross-repo commits - only commit to Dashboard repo
Maintain backward compatibility with existing output formats
Phase 6 must include doc-discovery, session-logging, and active-work.json cleanup
